description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pytest that runs on push to master and dev-gha branches and on pull requests to master. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11) with optional graphviz support. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies from requirements.txt, requirements_test.txt, and optionally requirements_mypy.txt and requirements_diagrams.txt, then run pytest with coverage and upload the results to Codecov.
